name: Modal OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
description: Registers a configured Modal Web Function that serves an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback Modal Web Function base URL when no base_url Plugin Setting is configured. The plugin accepts HTTPS modal.run endpoint origins or /v1 base URLs.
Optional fallback bearer token for Modal endpoints that implement conventional Authorization: Bearer authentication. Modal proxy Modal-Key/Modal-Secret auth is not handled by this safe slice.
Optional comma-separated model IDs exposed by the deployed Modal endpoint when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Modal base URL
settings.description: Modal Web Function URL for a deployed OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The plugin accepts provider-owned HTTPS modal.run origins or /v1 base URLs, and appends /v1 when only the origin is supplied.

settings.label: Modal bearer token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for endpoints that implement Authorization: Bearer authentication. Falls back to MODAL_BEARER_TOKEN.

settings.label: Modal model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the Modal endpoint. Use IDs returned by the deployed endpoint /v1/models response or the served model name. Falls back to comma-separated MODAL_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: Modal OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
providers.description: Registers configured Modal OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
